dmodule.note: Use exact namespace declarations from dmodule_opening_tag above

brexDmRef.note: SELF-REFERENCE — identical dmCode values as the document itself

content.note: content > brexDoc > brexDmRules — do NOT add any wrapper between content and brexDoc

contextRules.note: rulesContext should be empty string for rules applying to all DM types

brDecisionRef.note: ATTRIBUTE-BASED — use brDecisionIdentNumber attribute, NOT text content

objectPath.note: XPath-like path to the S1000D element this rule applies to

meaning.0: prohibited — element must NOT be used

inference_rules.use_0: proposal contains: must not, prohibited, forbidden, not allowed, discard
inference_rules.use_1: proposal contains: must, mandatory, required, shall, obligatory

objectUse.note: Free text. One clear sentence summarising the BRDP decision.

nonContextRule.note: Use for general rules not tied to a specific element path

example_rule.description: Correct conversion of one BRDP to structureObjectRule

brdp.definition: Language code must be en for all data modules
brdp.proposal: Only en/US language codes are allowed

example_rule.output:
<structureObjectRule>
  <brDecisionRef brDecisionIdentNumber="BRDP-S1-00001"/>
  <objectPath allowedObjectFlag="1">language/@languageIsoCode</objectPath>
  <objectUse>Language ISO code must be en for all data modules in this project.</objectUse>
  <objectValue valueAllowed="en">en</objectValue>
</structureObjectRule>

generation_rules: Output ONLY the XML — no markdown fences, no explanation, no preamble
Copy the exact namespace declarations from dmodule_opening_tag
infoCode is always 022, infoCodeVariant always A, itemLocationCode always A
content wraps brex which wraps brexDoc — do NOT put brexDoc directly inside content
brexDmRef is a self-reference — copy the exact same dmCode attributes from dmIdent
brexDmRef/dmRef/dmRefIdent must include BOTH dmCode AND issueInfo
brDecisionRef uses attribute brDecisionIdentNumber — NOT text content
Each validated BRDP becomes one structureObjectRule
Infer allowedObjectFlag from proposal text using inference_rules
objectUse must be one sentence summarising the decision
techName = project name; infoName = Business Rules Exchange
qualityAssurance uses unverified/ for new documents
